notes: Lesson 3 Part 1 (act 17, 'Equilibrium is the crossing point', 274.75s, 14 cues rescaled to the real MP3 via backfill-lesson3-cue-timing-rescale.mjs). Visual spine = shared price-quantity idioms in manim/econ.py (market_axes, demand_curve/supply_curve, equilibrium, gap_marker, push_arrow) with the one fixed linear market demand(q)=9-0.8q, supply(q)=1+0.8q, equilibrium Q*=5 P*=5. Two review iterations: round-1 authored+rendered all 14; round-2 fixed label collisions in Cue06 ('buyers want many' moved below its dot), Cue10 (Q_s reading was hidden behind the Supply label -> moved below the price line, and the wide verdict overlapped the Quantity/Demand labels -> replaced with a compact '→ surplus' in the clear right wedge), Cue12 ('not here' moved right of the wrong dot, 'the crossing' moved below the equilibrium dot), and Cue03 ('sellers want more' flipped to LEFT to clear the Supply label). Per-cue checklist (formula legibility+correctness, highlighted element matches narration, contrast, nothing off-frame/overlapping via theme.guard safe-area assertion, chunk timing): all pass. Chunk timing verified in render log: every cue within pinning tolerance, final 274.804s vs audio 274.75s Δ0.054s (<0.5s).
